subject: F9.GREEN: add cmd_profile + cmd_cluster to hsim
description: Add cmd_profile and cmd_cluster + their subparsers. cmd_profile writes an inline orchestrator YAML and shells to `python3 -m orchestrator.main run`. cmd_cluster shells to tools/simpoint/bin/simpoint directly. Reuse _resolve_artifacts() for the pre-flight artifact check. Test must turn green.
